jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Upstox
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Upstox in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox:
Upstox is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
